image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S036. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 镜中人无声说话，唇形清晰：把记忆还给我; 主角林澈震惊地看着镜子. narration intent: Narrator explains "镜中人说不出声音，但唇形清楚：把记忆还给我。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "你不是我。". shot positive notes: Close-up on a mirror in a dim kitchen, reflection of protagonist A with intense expression, lips forming words silently, dramatic lighting, cinematic, horror undertone.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S036. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 镜中人无声说话，唇形清晰：把记忆还给我; 主角林澈震惊地看着镜子. narration intent: Narrator explains "镜中人说不出声音，但唇形清楚：把记忆还给我。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "你不是我。". shot positive notes: Close-up on a mirror in a dim kitchen, reflection of protagonist A with intense expression, lips forming words silently, dramatic lighting, cinematic, horror undertone.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, cartoonish, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 镜中人说不出声音，但唇形清楚：把记忆还给我。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
